name: dev-browser
description: Browser automation with persistent page state via Playwright. Navigate websites, fill forms, take screenshots, extract web data, test web apps, and automate browser workflows.

hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" . && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package-lock.json" . 2>/dev/null; npm install --production) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"
